entities.name: E_FILE_NOT_FOUND
entities.description: E_OUT_OF_MEMORY E_FAIL 说明 该方法已成功完成。指针参数为 NULL。找不到用户设置。 内存不足，无法完成操作。方法失败。 要求

parameters.name: pcszSID
parameters.description: 用户的 SID 字符串。 如果此参数为 NULL，请检索当前用户的设置。[out] ppSettings 指向 IWPCSettings 接口指针的指针。

return_value.description: 此方法可以返回其中一个值。 返回代码 S_OK

entities.name: GetVisibility
entities.description: 获取家长控制用户界面的可见性状态

parameters.name: peVisibility
parameters.description: 指示用户界面是否隐藏。 此参数的取值可为下列值之一： 值

entities.name: E_OUT_OF_MEMORY
entities.description: E_FAIL 说明 该方法已成功完成。指针参数为 NULL。 内存不足，无法完成操作。方法失败。 要求

parameters.name: pcszSID
parameters.description: 用户的 SID 字符串。 如果此参数为 NULL，请检索当前用户的设置。[out] ppSettings 指向 IWPCWebSettings 接口指针的指针。

return_value.description: 此方法可以返回其中一个值。 返回代码 S_OK

entities.name: WPCFLAG_HOURS_RESTRICTED
entities.description: Indicates hours are restricted for parental controls. Value: 0x4

entities.name: GetLastSettingsChangeTime
entities.description: 方法 检索上次更新配置设置的时间。

parameters.name: pTime
parameters.description: 指向 SYSTEMTIME 结构的指针，该结构接收上次更新设置的时间。

entities.return_value: 如果函数成功，返回S_OK；否则返回错误代码。

entities.description: 访问的媒体文件类型是图片文件。

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE
entities.description: 枚举常量，指示在即时消息交互期间访问的功能信息。

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE_NONE
entities.description: Indicates no instant messaging features are enabled

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE_FILESWAP
entities.description: Flag value indicating file swap feature in Windows Parental Controls IM feature set

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE_SENDING
entities.description: 值：0x80000000，顶部位表示正在发送或接收消息。

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE_ALL
entities.description: Bitmask flag indicating all IM features are enabled

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE_AUDIO
entities.description: 标识即时消息会话中使用的音频功能，值为0x02

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE_GAME
entities.description: 值为 0x04，表示在即时消息会话期间使用了游戏功能。Windows Parental Controls 相关标志。

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE_SMS
entities.description: Flag value 0x08 indicating SMS feature was used during instant messaging session

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_FEATURE_URLSWAP
entities.description: Flag value: 0x20. Indicates that URLs or website locations were exchanged during an instant messaging session.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_LEAVE
entities.description: 指示有关参与者何时离开即时消息交互的信息。

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_LEAVE_CONVERSATION_END
entities.description: Flag indicating the end of leaving an IM conversation

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_LEAVE_NORMAL
entities.description: Flag value: 0x00000000. Indicates an instant messaging participant has left the conversation normally.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_IM_LEAVE_FORCED
entities.description: Value: 0x00000001 - Indicates an instant messaging participant was forced to leave the interaction.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED
entities.description: 指示有关阻止使用哪些事件以及哪些控件已就位的标志常量

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_NOTBLOCKED
entities.description: Value: 0x00000000 - Indicates no events are blocked for the user.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_EMAILBLOCKED
entities.description: Flag indicating email is blocked

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_MEDIAPLAYBACKBLOCKED
entities.description: 值为 0x00000004，表示媒体文件播放被阻止的标志。

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_CONTACTBLOCKED
entities.description: Contact blocked flag (value = 0x00000020)

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_BADPASS
entities.description: Flag indicating blocking due to bad password attempts

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_NOTEXPLICITLYALLOWED
entities.description: Flag value indicating content is blocked because it's not explicitly allowed

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_NOTKIDS
entities.description: Flag indicating content is blocked for non-kids (value: 0x00400000)

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_INTERNALERROR
entities.description: Internal error flag for website blocking status

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_GAMESBLOCKED
entities.description: Value: 0x00000010. Indicates that games are blocked by parental controls.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_FEATUREBLOCKED
entities.description: 常量值：0x00000040，表示用户阻止功能被触发

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_DOWNLOADBLOCKED
entities.description: Value: 0x00000080. Indicates the user cannot download files.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_RATINGBLOCKED
entities.description: Value: 0x00000100. Indicates that content with specified ratings is blocked by user.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_EXPLICITBLOCK
entities.description: Value: 0x00000400. Flags indicating explicit content is blocked by parental controls.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_MAXHOURS
entities.description: 值为 0x00001000，表示用户已达到允许计算机访问的最大小时数。

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_SPECHOURS
entities.description: 值：0x00002000。表示阻止用户访问计算机，因为当前时间超出了该用户允许的使用时段。

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_ATTACHMENTBLOCKED
entities.description: Value: 0x00008000. Indicates that attachments are blocked for the user.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_RECEIVERBLOCKED
entities.description: 常量值：0x00020000，表示阻止用户从指定帐户接收任何信息

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_NOTINLIST
entities.description: 值为0x00080000，表示用户被阻止访问未列入允许列表的功能

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_CATEGORYNOTINLIST
entities.description: Value: 0x00200000. User is blocked because the category is not listed as allowed.

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_UNRATED
entities.description: 值为0x00800000，表示用户被阻止访问未分级内容

entities.name: WPCFLAG_ISBLOCKED_NOACCESS
entities.description: Value: 0x01000000 - Blocks user from any access

entities.name: WPCFLAG_LOGOFF_TYPE_LOGOUT
entities.description: Value: 0x00000000 - User logged off by logging out of the computer

entities.name: WPCFLAG_LOGOFF_TYPE_FORCEDFUS
entities.description: Forced logoff type flag
